text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I will show everyone exactly who I am
now.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Th-they're so loud... I'm starting to get a little
nervous...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to say... I will not lose to anyone
today—including the two of you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm aware of your skills and how frightening they
are. However, I am looking forward to racing you
both.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Why'd you come all the way over here to say
so?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it's because this is the first time I have
taken a proper look at you all.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I simply do as I see fit. My only goal is to prove
that my way of doing things is right.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm... not gonna lose, either! Let's have a good
race!
